title: Fit test - 1st screen UI
scenario: Fit Test initial screen UI matches Figma design when navigating to Device Settings > Fit Test with Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Free 20 connected
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure a supported device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Free 20) is connected via Bluetooth.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. Scroll down and tap on 'Fit Test' in the Device Settings menu.
5. Observe the Fit Test screen UI, including all text labels, icons, buttons, and layout.
expected: The Fit Test screen UI and all text elements match the Figma design specifications exactly.
